name: blueprint-mode
description: Spec-driven development with documented decision rationale: specs, ADRs, patterns, requirements, and a separate design tree for UX decisions and design patterns

interface.shortDescription: Keep ADRs, specs, and patterns as a stable source of truth
interface.longDescription: Blueprint Mode helps teams document architecture decisions, requirements, boundaries, and good and bad code patterns so AI-assisted development stays consistent over time.
defaultPrompt: Onboard this repo into Blueprint Mode
Record an ADR for this architecture choice
Show the current Blueprint docs in this repo
